# cmccloudv2_apigateway_backup (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) The id of api gateway instance
- `name` (String) The name of the backup

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The created time of the backup
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `size` (Number) The size of the backup in byte
- `status` (String) The status of the backup
